lines: How do you think your friend feels right now, {player}?
The world looks different from every angle. Let's see together!
It's so kind of you to think about others, {player}.
no_quest_line: Your heart is so open to others, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm trying to understand someone's feelings. Will you help me, {player}?
quest_progress_line: You're doing a great job seeing through others' eyes, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Thank you, {player}! Now I understand much better.
